Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\gfp0\\Desktop\\financeiro-pessoal\\server" && node --no-warnings=ExperimentalWarning -e "
const { DatabaseSync } = require\('node:sqlite'\);
const db = new DatabaseSync\('financeiro.db'\);

// Verificar transações Dinheiro em 2026 \(mais recentes\)
console.log\('=== Transações Dinheiro em 2026 até março ==='\);
db.prepare\(\\`
  SELECT purchase_date, category, description, installment_amount
  FROM expenses
  WHERE payment_method = 'Dinheiro'
    AND purchase_date >= '2026-01-01'
    AND purchase_date <= '2026-03-13'
  ORDER BY purchase_date
\\`\).all\(\).forEach\(r => console.log\(r\)\);

console.log\('\\n=== Saldo Dinheiro acumulado MÊS A MÊS \(2025-2026\) ==='\);
db.prepare\(\\`
  SELECT strftime\('%Y-%m', purchase_date\) as mes,
    SUM\(installment_amount\) as soma_mes,
    SUM\(SUM\(installment_amount\)\) OVER \(ORDER BY strftime\('%Y-%m', purchase_date\)\) as acumulado
  FROM expenses
  WHERE payment_method = 'Dinheiro'
  GROUP BY mes
  ORDER BY mes DESC
  LIMIT 18
\\`\).all\(\).forEach\(r => console.log\(r\)\);
")
